## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Tests cover the new behavior.
- [ ] Security model impact is documented when the change touches secrets,
      auth, crypto, local storage, agent behavior, or passkeys.
- [ ] No real vault data, live credentials, or production secrets are added.
- [ ] User-facing docs or help text are updated when command behavior changes.
